creator: vvd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 233489
Update to 22.2.0

Tested on 12.3 amd64: check-plist/install/run.

Version 22.2:
* (Linux and Mac OS) The options to send video to another screen and choose the audio output device have been fixed.
* (Flatpak package) Add support for the AV1 codec.
* (Mac OS) Fix colors in HDR videos.
* (Mac OS) SMPlayer is now also compatible now with Mac OS 10.14 (Mojave).
* Fix: the playlist is shuffled after adding files if the shuffle button is on.
* Other small fixes.
